content: I began my **Master**'s degree studies at **Wuhan University**.
content_zh: 我开始在**武汉大学**攻读**硕士**学位。

content: Our work "**_Multiscale Restoration of Missing Data in Optical Time-series Images with Masked Spatial-Temporal Attention Network_**" was accepted by **IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)**.
content_zh: 我们的工作 "**_Multiscale Restoration of Missing Data in Optical Time-series Images with Masked Spatial-Temporal Attention Network_**" 被 **IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)** 录用。

content: Our work "**_Image-text mutual retrieval method based on large-scale pre-training CLIP model fine-tuning_**" won the **Grand Prize (Top 0.1%)** and **20,000 RMB** cash in the **12th "Teddy Cup" Data Mining Challenge** [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml).
content_zh: 我们的作品 "**_基于大规模预训练CLIP模型微调的图文互检方法_**" 在第12届**“泰迪杯”数据挖掘挑战赛**中获得**特等奖 (Top 0.1%)** 及 **2万元**奖金 [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml)。
